text: Taiwan port strikes historically add 14-21 days to shipping lead times. In 2023-Q3 a Keelung port strike lasted 18 days. Severity typically 0.75-0.90. Affected SKUs sourced through Taiwan tier-1 suppliers.

Zhengzhou flooding events add approximately 14 days to lead times for suppliers sourcing from Henan province. Historical events: 2021 (severe, 21 days), 2023 (moderate, 10 days). SinoRaw Ltd in Zhengzhou is a known tier-2 supplier for European electronics assemblers.

Rotterdam fog events are almost always false positives for supply chain disruption. Port operations resume within 6 hours in 94% of cases. Do not raise alerts for Rotterdam fog alone — severity typically 0.10-0.20.
VN-FAB-03 in Vietnam successfully substituted for TaiwanChipCo during the 2023 Taiwan strait tensions. Transition took 4 days, lead time was 14 days, quality metrics met 97% of spec.
Operator preference: prioritize SKU-MCU-01 alerts above all others. It is the most critical component with no buffer stock policy. Always recommend alternatives immediately when gap_days < -7.
